title: Simply Swords Battle Standard Tweaks
description: A Fabric mod for Simply Swords that makes Battle Standard effects, radius, and damage fully configurable.
body:
## Simply Swords Battle Standard Tweaks

A Fabric add-on for Simply Swords (1.20.1) that allows you to configure the hardcoded values of the Battle Standards (Abyssal Standard & Galeforce).

### Features

- Adjust the effect amplifier levels granted to the player and to other entities.
- Change the effective range of the standard's aura.
- Modify Galeforce's AOE damage

Config file location: **config/simplyswords_main/battle_standard_tweaks.json**


### Credits

- Based on [ImEden6's](https://github.com/ImEden6) idea for the [Haste Tweaks](https://github.com/ImEden6/simplyswords-haste-tweaks) mod
